name: codebase-frontmatter-summary
description: Codex plugin for incremental repository indexing with sidecar metadata, SQLite state, and dual-host guide export.

interface.shortDescription: Scan a tree into sidecar metadata, section indexes, directory summaries, and dual-host guides
interface.longDescription: Use the Codebase Frontmatter Summary plugin to build an incremental repository knowledge layer backed by SQLite state, JSON sidecars, generated AGENTS and CLAUDE guides, and a deterministic read planner for progressive file access.
defaultPrompt: Use the codebase-frontmatter-summary plugin to refresh this repository into .scanmeta sidecars, export AGENTS and CLAUDE guides, and preserve incremental state in SQLite.
